title: bahn.de Web API
description: Calls bahn.de web API endpoints (orte or fahrplan). Dataset rows mirror upstream JSON. See openapi/bahn-web-api.openapi.json.

query.title: Suchbegriff (orte)
query.description: Station or place search term. Required when endpoint is orte.

stationType.title: Ort-Typ (orte)
stationType.description: Filter location type for station search (maps to bahn.de typ parameter).

limit.title: Limit (orte)
limit.description: Maximum number of locations returned by station search.

origin.title: Startbahnhof (fahrplan)
origin.description: Departure station name for connection search. Required when endpoint is fahrplan.

destination.title: Zielbahnhof (fahrplan)
destination.description: Arrival station name for connection search. Required when endpoint is fahrplan.

departureDateTime.title: Abfahrt (ISO)
departureDateTime.description: Departure date and time in ISO format, e.g. 2026-06-01T08:00:00. Alternative to travelDate plus departureHour.

travelDate.title: Reisedatum (fahrplan)
travelDate.description: Travel date as YYYY-MM-DD. Used when departureDateTime is not set.

departureHour.title: Abfahrt Stunde
departureHour.description: Departure hour (0–23) when using travelDate instead of departureDateTime.

departureMinute.title: Abfahrt Minute
departureMinute.description: Departure minute (0–59) when using travelDate instead of departureDateTime.

travelClass.title: Reiseklasse
travelClass.description: Travel class: 1 = first class, 2 = second class.

passengerAge.title: Passagieralter
passengerAge.description: Passenger age in years (affects fare calculation on bahn.de).

bahnCard.title: BahnCard
bahnCard.description: BahnCard discount level, or none if no card.

hasDeutschlandTicket.title: Deutschland-Ticket
hasDeutschlandTicket.description: Whether the passenger has a Deutschland-Ticket.

deutschlandTicketOnly.title: Nur Deutschland-Ticket-Verbindungen
deutschlandTicketOnly.description: Return only connections valid with the Deutschland-Ticket.

maxTransfers.title: Max. Umstiege
maxTransfers.description: Maximum number of transfers allowed in connection search.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Residential DE proxies are recommended for bahn.de.
